subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the All-Knowing unto them that have believed in God, the Almighty, the All-Wise, that they may rejoice in that which they have been remembered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی العلیم الی الذین آمنوا بالله العزیز الحکیم لیفرحوا بما ذکروا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
